steps.title: Run the repository-profile promotion step: for runtime repos, merge the integrated `development` commit onto `main`, push `main`, and create and push a release tag from that exact promoted commit; for PR-to-staging repos, merge the reviewed PR into `staging` and use that merged staging revision as the deploy candidate

Run the repository-profile deploy step: for runtime repos, use `bun run deploy-manager-runtime <release-tag>` or `bun run deploy-manager-runtime`; for PR-to-staging repos, wait for the staged deployment path driven by the merged PR and capture the deployed revision or version
Verify the repository-profile environment revision match and any required frontend-backend version match

Run the repository-profile live health verification: for runtime repos, check `http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/health` and confirm the dashboard and manager report healthy status; for PR-to-staging repos, confirm the staged environment loads and the changed behavior is healthy there
